'''Pyrshak''' was the primary [[Star/Legends|star]] of the [[Pyrshak system]], located in the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. It was orbited by three [[Planet/Legends|planets]]: the molten world [[Pyr]], the [[Water/Legends|water]] world [[Manaan/Legends|Manaan]], and the [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] [[Navlaas/Legends|Navlaas]].

==Behind the scenes==
Pyrshak first appeared in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'', and was first named in the [[2004]] Wizards of the Coast article [[Manaan: Depths of History]]. The Pyrshak system was originally placed in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]], but later sources shifted it to the Inner Rim.
